title: Ancient Wonders of the World
description: A coloring journey through important ancient civilizations that helps young learners discover how people lived long ago and the amazing things they built.
instructions: Color each part of the image using your favorite colors. As you color, ask a grown-up to read you the fun facts about these ancient places!

content.image: A simplified landscape showing four ancient civilization elements: an Egyptian pyramid with a sphinx, a Greek temple with columns, a section of the Great Wall of China, and a Roman aqueduct. Each is clearly separated and drawn with bold, simple outlines appropriate for young children to color.

elements.name: Egyptian Pyramid
elements.description: Color the giant triangle-shaped building and the sphinx (lion with a human face) in front of it

elements.name: Greek Temple
elements.description: Color the building with tall columns and a triangular roof

elements.name: Great Wall
elements.description: Color the long wall that stretches across the hills

elements.name: Roman Aqueduct
elements.description: Color the bridge-like structure with arches that carried water

learningFacts: The pyramids in Egypt were built over 4,500 years ago!
Ancient Greeks built beautiful temples to honor their gods and goddesses
The Great Wall of China is so long you could walk on it for months
Romans built aqueducts to bring fresh water to their cities
